name: dev.smartergpt/lex
title: Lex
description: Episodic memory and architectural policy for AI agents. Frames, Atlas, and Policy.

environmentVariables.name: LEX_WORKSPACE_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Project root directory for Lex runtime discovery. Defaults to current working directory.

environmentVariables.name: LEX_STORE
environmentVariables.description: Frame-store backend: sqlite or postgres. Defaults to sqlite unless LEX_DATABASE_URL selects PostgreSQL.

environmentVariables.name: LEX_DB_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to SQLite database file. Defaults to .smartergpt/lex/memory.db under the project root.

environmentVariables.name: LEX_MEMORY_DB
environmentVariables.description: Alias for LEX_DB_PATH (backwards compatibility). Same behavior.

environmentVariables.name: LEX_DATABASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: PostgreSQL connection URL for the compatibility adapter. Treat as secret because it may contain credentials.

environmentVariables.name: LEX_POSTGRES_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: PostgreSQL password supplied separately when LEX_DATABASE_URL omits one.

environmentVariables.name: LEX_POSTGRES_POOL_MAX
environmentVariables.description: Maximum PostgreSQL compatibility-adapter pool size. Defaults to 10.

environmentVariables.name: LEX_DEBUG
environmentVariables.description: Set to any value to enable debug logging to stderr.
